author: y4rr
content: Decision: Used derived formula H = (1-1/a)*(euler+digamma(b+1)) + (1-1/b) - log(a) - log(b) for Kumaraswamy entropy rather than the PyTorch source formula (which has a sign error). The derivation via E[log X] = (-euler-digamma(b+1))/a and E[log(1-X^a)] = -1/b (exact, since X^a ~ Power(b)) matches the fixture values. digamma(b+1) computed via shift-then-asymptotic (valid for all real b>0, unlike the previous integer-step loop which diverged for fractional b in (0,1)).
